title: dianthera inaequalis
intro: Dianthera inaequalis, also known as the 'Yellow Lizard's Tail', is a plant species native to tropical regions of the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Dianthera inaequalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
